name: Mellany Aumua
ai_summary: Mellany Aumua is a 23-year-old from Salt Lake City, UT with informal childcare experience from babysitting and caring for nieces and nephews. She is available FT/PT with Thu/Fri off, and handles conflicts by having children sit and talk through their feelings at a distance.

transcripts.q3:

 and I hope that this goes well,
